title: ailanthus excelsa
intro: Ailanthus excelsa, also known as the Chinese tree of heaven, is a deciduous tree native to China and commonly found in urban areas due to its tolerance for pollution and poor soil conditions. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiviral effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid compounds. The health benefits of Ailanthus excelsa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various conditions. Ailanthus excelsa can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
